overall.description: First-person exploration of the Astronomy Tower in Hogwarts Legacy, ascending through corridors lined with blue astronomical tapestries, entering a grand circular classroom with an ornate orrery chandelier, and climbing a long stone spiral staircase. The environment features detailed gothic architecture with stone walls, wooden beams, and magical astronomical decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairwell leading to tapestry corridor

events.description: enters the room with large blue astronomical tapestries from the initial stairwell
approaches the stone archway leading to the circular classroom

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and walking through a corridor lined with large blue tapestries depicting celestial charts and astronomical figures

entered.detail: dark wooden handrail along the initial staircase
large blue wall hangings with gold celestial charts, stars, and robed figures
tall ornate brass instrument with glowing red center standing between tapestries
gothic stone arch with wooden doors leading to the next room

segments.scene_description: The segment begins ascending a wooden staircase in a stone corridor, then enters a room lined with magnificent blue astronomical tapestries featuring celestial maps and figures studying the stars. A tall metal astrolabe stands in the center as the camera approaches a stone archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular astronomy classroom with high vaulted ceiling and orrery chandelier

events.description: enters the large circular classroom through the stone archway into bright sunlight
pans left to examine the wall with portraits and astronomical charts
looks upward at the ornate orrery chandelier and star-painted ceiling dome

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular classroom, examining astronomical instruments, bookshelves, and looking up at the ceiling structure

entered.detail: arched stone doorway with blue trim marking the entrance
large brass celestial chandelier with multiple rotating rings and glowing lights
tall pointed windows with circular details letting in bright sunlight
semicircular wooden tables arranged in rings around the room
large dark chalkboard with astronomical diagrams and charts

segments.scene_description: Entering a magnificent circular classroom flooded with natural light from tall gothic windows, the camera explores the space featuring curved wooden desks, an elaborate brass orrery chandelier hanging from a star-painted ceiling, and walls adorned with astronomical charts and portraits. The room has a grand, open feel with blue painted walls and gold accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor and stairwell with storage

events.description: exits the circular classroom back to the tapestry corridor
enters the narrow dark stairwell with covered furniture and storage
turns to ascend the steep wooden stairs in the tight enclosure

agents.ego_description: leaving the classroom through the corridor and entering a narrow stairwell with covered furniture, passing a student

notable_agents.action: student in school robes walking past the camera carrying books

entered.detail: chairs and items covered with white sheets against the wall
framed portraits hanging on the wooden panel walls
steep wooden staircase in a tight timber-framed enclosure

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bright classroom back through the tapestry corridor, the camera enters a narrow, dimly lit service stairwell with furniture covered in white sheets and portraits on wooden walls. A student in robes walks past as the camera begins ascending a steep wooden staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall stone spiral staircase with slit windows

events.description: transitions from wooden stairs to the long stone spiral staircase
passes a bright vertical window slit illuminating the stone steps
approaches the top landing where a figure sits on a bench

agents.ego_description: climbing the long curving stone staircase with tall narrow windows, approaching a landing

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a wooden bench reading at the stairwell landing

entered.detail: tall curving staircase made of grey stone blocks with worn steps
tall narrow slit windows in the thick stone walls
medieval suit of armor standing in a stone alcove
dark wooden bench against the stone wall at the landing

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a long ascent up a curving stone spiral staircase with thick grey stone walls and narrow slit windows providing beams of light. The camera passes a suit of armor in an alcove and approaches the top landing where a figure sits on a wooden bench reading, with a dark corridor visible beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, tapestry-lined corridor into a grand, light-filled astronomical classroom. It begins by ascending a wooden staircase within a stone corridor, moving past magnificent blue celestial tapestries and a tall metal astrolabe toward a distant stone archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the enclosed space opens into a magnificent circular classroom flooded with natural light from tall gothic windows. The scene then expands to reveal curved wooden desks and walls adorned with astronomical charts, before tilting upward toward an elaborate brass orrery chandelier hanging from a star-painted ceiling.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a dimly lit service area into the stark, towering heights of a stone spiral staircase. It begins by exiting a bright classroom and moving through a narrow corridor where furniture draped in white sheets and portraits on wooden walls line the path. As a student in robes passes by, the camera transitions from the wooden stairs of the service stairwell into a long, curving climb up a massive stone spiral. The environment shifts to thick grey masonry punctuated by narrow slit windows that cast sharp beams of light across the walls and a suit of armor resting in an alcove. The movement finally reaches the top landing, passing a figure reading on a wooden bench before facing a dark corridor.
